'''Jokomo Barillard''' was a member of the [[Galactic Radicals]] organization and was affiliated with the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boozoo Boga|"Bogey" Boga]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1stm}}
